name: Crib Bedding Set Forest Frolic 4pc - Cloud Island™ Pink
description:
Your baby will feel so much warmth and love when surrounded by the Pink Forest Frolic Crib Bedding Set from Cloud Island™. The whimsical pink forest pattern is full of vibrant trees, animals, flowers and stripes. The four-piece set includes sweet details like embroidery, quilting and soft ribbon trim, and will look darling as your baby's nursery bedding.

Sleep Safely, Little One
When putting baby to sleep, “Bare is Best” in the crib. Use a firm, tight-fitting mattress and remove pillows, quilts, comforters, toys and other soft items. For more information about safe sleep, visit www.cpsc.gov

We made it better so you can feel better.
This product is STANDARD 100 by OEKO-TEX® certified, meaning it is free from harmful levels of chemical substances.
